message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock after asupersync v0.2.0 dependency bump

Regenerates the lockfile to reflect the asupersync version update and
its transitive dependency tree changes. No source code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ checksum = "7c02d123df017efcdfbd739ef81735b36c5ba83ec3c59c80a9d7ecc718f92e50"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.2.0"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
@@ -509,7 +509,7 @@ checksum = "77ce24cb58228fbb8aa041425bb1050850ac19177686ea6e0f41a70416f56fdb"
